cases.name: flags an unsourced rate

input.task: The deduction limit is 60% of income this year.

cases.rationale: a rate/amount claim must be classed and matched to a dated source or softened/cut

cases.name: catches forum/jurisdiction phrasing

input.task: A federal court ruled the detector unreliable.

cases.rationale: court-forum is a silent claim-class the gate must sweep for
